title: crotalaria ramosissima var. ramosissima
intro: Crotalaria ramosissima var. ramosissima, also known as a shrubby rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to western North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria ramosissima var. ramosissima include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
